subject: Armand
body:
Dear Jeffery,

Hope you are fine.
Are you in Paris right now ?

My daughter lives in beautiful "hotel particulier" next to the Élysée Palace with indoor pool, cinema, hammam...
Could be interesting for you.

Give me a sign if you're in Paris.
My new cell phone number:
████████████

Best regards 

Armand 


Envoyé de mon iPhone





















Envoyé de mon iPhone
